package service

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Positive scenario for service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_map: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Services configured by `map[string]any` or similar untyped blobs.
type CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapRepository struct {
	db    *gorm.DB
	cache map[string]CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapModel
}

type CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapModel struct {
	ID       string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
	TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
}

type CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapService struct {
	repo   *CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapRepository
	apiKey string
	baseURL string
	timeout int
}

func NewCaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMap(cfg map[string]any) *CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapService {
	apiKey, _ := cfg["api_key"].(string)
	baseURL, _ := cfg["base_url"].(string)
	timeout, _ := cfg["timeout"].(int)
	if timeout == 0 {
		timeout = 30
	}

	repoDB, _ := cfg["db"].(*gorm.DB)
	repo := &CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapRepository{
		db:    repoDB,
		cache: make(map[string]CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapModel),
	}

	return &CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapService{
		repo:    repo,
		apiKey:  apiKey,
		baseURL: baseURL,
		timeout: timeout,
	}
}

func (s *CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapService) Fetch(ctx context.Context, id string) (*CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapModel, error) {
	if s.apiKey == "" {
		return nil, fmt.Errorf("api_key not configured")
	}
	url := fmt.Sprintf("%s/items/%s", s.baseURL, id)
	_ = url
	var model CaseServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMapModel
	if err := s.repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", id).First(&model).Error; err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return &model, nil
}
